message:
🐛 Fix Copilot assignment: use COPILOT_GITHUB_TOKEN org secret

Replace non-existent COPILOT_PAT repo secret with COPILOT_GITHUB_TOKEN
org secret for the otto-de/assign_issue_toCopilot_action. Also add
continue-on-error so the instructions comment and label updates still
execute if assignment fails (the @Copilot mention in the comment serves
as a fallback trigger).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -103,10 +103,11 @@ jobs:
       - name: Assign Copilot to issue
         if: steps.check_processing.outputs.already_processing != 'true'
         id: assign_copilot
+        continue-on-error: true
         uses: otto-de/assign_issue_toCopilot_action@v1.0.1
         with:
           issue_number: ${{ steps.issue.outputs.number }}
-          github_token: ${{ secrets.COPILOT_PAT }}
+          github_token: ${{ secrets.COPILOT_GITHUB_TOKEN }}
 
       - name: Post instructions comment
         if: steps.check_processing.outputs.already_processing != 'true'

@@ -85,10 +85,11 @@ jobs:
       - name: Assign Copilot to issue
         if: steps.check_perms.outputs.authorized == 'true'
         id: assign_copilot
+        continue-on-error: true
         uses: otto-de/assign_issue_toCopilot_action@v1.0.1
         with:
           issue_number: ${{ github.event.issue.number }}
-          github_token: ${{ secrets.COPILOT_PAT }}
+          github_token: ${{ secrets.COPILOT_GITHUB_TOKEN }}
 
       - name: Update labels on assignment success
         if: steps.check_perms.outputs.authorized == 'true' && steps.assign_copilot.outputs.success == 'true'
